experiments.label: label_long_hit_2r_48c
experiments.notes: D40 validation: reproduce D35 through engine (no retraining)

experiments.label: label_long_hit_2r_48c
experiments.notes: RQ1: Add ob_quality features, retrain, compare SHAP rank vs raw ob_bull_age (#1, 0.2057).

experiments.label: label_long_hit_2r_48c
experiments.notes: RQ4: Add breaker block features, retrain. Expect breaker_age to rank in top 20.

experiments.label: label_long_hit_2r_48c
experiments.notes: RQ5: OI rate-of-change vs FVG. v3 OI columns included.

experiments.label: label_short_hit_2r_48c
experiments.notes: E004: short baseline, label_short_hit_2r_48c, standard tier. D48.

experiments.label: label_long_hit_2r_48c
experiments.notes: TRQ3: Weekly tier, 7-day cooldown, standard labels. D49.

experiments.label: label_long_hit_2r_48c
experiments.notes: RQ6: HMM bull gate. Tests regime-conditional ICT edge.

experiments.label: label_long_hit_2r_48c
experiments.notes: RQ7: Regime features as soft inputs. No hard filter.

experiments.label: label_long_hit_2r_48c
experiments.notes: D54a: clean baseline on v3_train with D53 ICT features. E002_prune equivalent. 288-bar embargo, label purging. All features (no prune list -- fresh evaluation).

experiments.label: label_short_hit_2r_48c
experiments.notes: D54c: clean short baseline on v3_train with D53 ICT features. E004_short_baseline equivalent. 288-bar embargo, label purging. All features (no prune list).

experiments.label: label_long_hit_2r_48c
experiments.notes: D55a: Drop Tier 3 (560 features with |SHAP| < 0.003). Keep Tier 1 (64) + Tier 2 (46) = 110 features. Baseline AUC 0.7933 (D54a). Target: within 0.002.

experiments.label: label_long_hit_2r_48c
experiments.notes: D55b: Tier 1 only (64 features with |SHAP| >= 0.010). Dropped Tier 2 (46) and Tier 3 (560). Baseline AUC 0.7933 (D54a). Target: within 0.002.
